location: NOT OBTAINABLE IN THE BASE GAME. This weapon is exclusive to the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC — found on a corpse on a ledge near the entrance to the Church of Benediction, Gravesite Plain, in the Land of Shadow (very close to where players first arrive in the DLC). There is no base-game source.
region: Gravesite Plain (Shadow of the Erdtree DLC — not a base-game region)

source.name: corpse near the Church of Benediction

tactics: Flag for the data owner: base/fists.json lists this as base-game content, but every source confirms it debuted in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC with no base-game equivalent — do not confuse it with the base-game Cipher Pata, which is a wholly different item.
It is the longest fist weapon in its class and retains a running-heavy-into-standing-heavy true combo that the older Katar had removed.
It's found essentially at the DLC's opening area, very early in a Shadow of the Erdtree playthrough.
lore: A straight, double-edged blade fixed to a substantial hand guard, worn by Oathseeker Knights so it can be swung fist-like or thrust like a straight sword.

builds.name: Reach quality brawler
builds.why: Longest fist weapon available with matched D/D Strength/Dexterity scaling, good for a quality build wanting extra range.
